name: nodeweaver
description: NestJS fullstack scaffolder with Loom declarative admin

scripts.build: pnpm --filter nodeweaver build && pnpm --filter create-nodeweaver build && pnpm --filter @nodeweaver/loom build
scripts.dev:stack: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "pnpm --filter api dev" "pnpm --filter web dev"
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @nodeweaver/loom test && pnpm build && node packages/nodeweaver/dist/test-scaffold.js nodeweaver-smoke-test
